title: AN ACT AMENDING PROJECT No. G-038.27, PAGE 1118-A, APPENDIX A OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6084 / 58 OG No. 17, 3525 (April 23, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3314, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT AMENDING PROJECT No. G-038.27, PAGE 1118-A, APPENDIX A OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Project No. G-038.27, page 1118-A of Appendix A of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen is amended to read as follows:

"G-038.27 (a): Maddella Communal Irrigation: GOB&mdash10.00&mdash10.00-10.00 :ГўВЂВ”:ГўВЂВ”:ГўВЂВ”:ГўВЂВ”:ГўВЂВ”

"G-038.27(b) : Salat Communal Irrigation, Diffun: GOB&mdash5.00ГўВЂВ” 5.00-5.00 :ГўВЂВ”:ГўВЂВ”:ГўВЂВ”:ГўВЂВ”:ГўВЂВ”:ГўВЂВ”

"G-038.27(c): Aurora East Communal Irrigation, Diffun:GOBГўВЂВ” 5.00-5.00-5.00 :ГўВЂВ”:ГўВЂВ”:ГўВЂВ”"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
